subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Lord of Hosts! Thy letter was received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده رب الجنود نامه مرسول وصول یافت
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @free will and predestination; fate, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @Adam; Adam and Eve, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings
